name: COMPANY_NAME
description: Client's trading name. Appears in page title and hero section.

name: PHONE_DISPLAY
description: Phone number formatted for display (e.g. '(800) 000-0000').

name: PHONE_HREF
description: Phone number for tel: href. Digits only, no spaces (e.g. '8000000000').

name: ACCENT_COLOR
description: Brand hex color. Used as --primary and --accent CSS variables. Defaults to REI Transfer red.

name: LOGO_URL
description: Absolute URL to client logo image (Vercel Blob CDN URL).

name: HEADLINE
description: Hero section headline text.

name: SUBHEADLINE
description: Hero section subheadline text.

name: STAT_1_VALUE
description: First trust stat value (e.g. '1,000+').

name: STAT_1_LABEL
description: First trust stat label (e.g. 'Homes Purchased').

name: STAT_2_VALUE
description: Second trust stat value.

name: STAT_2_LABEL
description: Second trust stat label.

name: STAT_3_VALUE
description: Third trust stat value.

name: STAT_3_LABEL
description: Third trust stat label.

name: META_TITLE
description: SEO <title> tag content.

name: META_DESCRIPTION
description: SEO meta description content.

name: PRIVACY_POLICY_URL
description: URL for privacy policy page. Defaults to /privacy (built into template).

name: TERMS_URL
description: URL for terms of service page. Defaults to /terms (built into template).

name: DISQUALIFIED_PROPERTY_TYPES
description: Comma-separated list of property type IDs that trigger an immediate disqualification screen. Valid IDs: single-family, multi-family, condo-townhouse, mobile-home, land, other. Defaults to mobile-home,land,other.

name: WEBHOOK_URL
description: n8n lead handler webhook. Format: https://n8n.srv1197128.hstgr.cloud/webhook/lead-{slug}.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY
description: Google Places API key for address autocomplete. Shared across all clients (restrict via GCP Console). In the deploy webapp, this reads from NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_FB_PIXEL_ID
description: Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID. Leave empty if client has no pixel yet; set post-deploy.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDALYTICS_ACCOUNT_ID
description: Vidalytics account ID for video embed. Optional -- set post-deploy if client uses video.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDALYTICS_EMBED_ID
description: Vidalytics embed ID. Optional -- set post-deploy if client uses video.

name: SERVICE_AREAS
description: JSON array of service area circles: [{id, centerLat, centerLng, radiusMiles}]. Passed to address autocomplete for location bias.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVICE_AREAS
description: Client-side copy of SERVICE_AREAS for address autocomplete location bias and validation. JSON array of circles: [{centerLat, centerLng, radiusMiles}].

name: V3_ENABLED
description: Enables the /v3 zero-distraction form route; "true" makes /v3 live, anything else 404s.

name: IBUYKC_STYLE
description: Enables the iBuyKC landing style: white page background, accent color only on buttons, dark readable text, enlarged logo, and a flexible owner/team photo (un-cropped, natural aspect). "true" turns it on; anything else or unset renders the legacy style. New clients default to "true" via this schema; existing rei-survey-template@main projects without this env stay byte-identical on the legacy style.

name: MOTIVATION_V2
description: Enables William's v2 motivation/reason-for-selling list on BOTH the homepage (v1) and /v3 forms: 8 valid reasons (Facing foreclosure, Behind on payments, Inherited property, Divorce or separation, Can't afford repairs, Vacant property I need to sell, Urgent financial situation not listed above, Personal situation not listed above) plus a 9th hard-disqualifier ("No reason / seeing what my house is worth") that shows the block screen and never submits the lead. "true" turns it on; anything else or unset renders the legacy reason list with no disqualifier. New clients default to "true" via this schema; existing rei-survey-template@main projects without this env stay byte-identical on the legacy reason list.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_GOFUNNEL_ORG_ID
description: GoFunnel attribution tracking org (client) id. Per-client. Loads the GoFunnel tracking script (sets gf_sid session cookie) when set; blank/unset disables tracking, so deployments without it stay byte-identical.

name: GOFUNNEL_WEBHOOK_CREDENTIAL_ID
description: GoFunnel external / custom-webhook credential id. Per-client. When set together with GOFUNNEL_WEBHOOK_SECRET, /api/submit forwards each completed lead to GoFunnel (type=survey_submitted) alongside the n8n webhook. Blank/unset disables the forward.

name: GOFUNNEL_WEBHOOK_SECRET
description: Bearer secret for the GoFunnel external webhook (pairs with GOFUNNEL_WEBHOOK_CREDENTIAL_ID). Blank/unset disables the forward.
